# Plan: Mobile Bottom Tab Navigation

## Problem

On mobile, the tab selectors (Info, Git, Pipelines, Tasks, Queue, Schedules, Chat) are rendered as a horizontal scrollable strip at the **top** of the repo detail view. This is not ideal for mobile UX — tabs at the bottom are thumb-friendly and more discoverable. Additionally, the existing bottom nav only shows Back/Queue/Chat and doesn't integrate with the full tab list.

## Proposed Approach

Replace the top horizontal tab strip (on mobile only) with a **bottom tab bar** that:
- Shows 3 pinned tabs by default: **Tasks**, **Queue**, **Chat**
- Adds a **`...`** (More) tab that opens a bottom sheet listing all remaining tabs (Info, Git, Pipelines, Schedules + any others)
- Hides the top tab strip on mobile
- Preserves current desktop behavior unchanged

The existing `BottomNav` component (Back/Queue/Chat) will be merged or replaced by the new bottom tab bar. The `Back` action moves to the workspace header area or a back arrow in the top bar.

---

## Key Files

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `packages/coc/src/server/spa/client/react/repos/RepoDetail.tsx` | Renders top tab strip; mobile layout; `SUB_TABS` definition |
| `packages/coc/src/server/spa/client/react/layout/BottomNav.tsx` | Current mobile bottom nav (Back/Queue/Chat) |
| `packages/coc/src/server/spa/client/react/types/dashboard.ts` | `RepoSubTab` type |
| `packages/coc/src/server/spa/client/react/layout/Router.tsx` | Hash-based routing (`#repos/{id}/{subTab}`) |

---

## Todos

1. **Audit current mobile tab strip** — Read `RepoDetail.tsx` (tab strip section, lines ~355–396) and `BottomNav.tsx` fully to map all state/props interactions before touching anything.

2. **Create `MobileTabBar` component** — New file `packages/coc/src/server/spa/client/react/layout/MobileTabBar.tsx`:
   - Props: `activeTab`, `onTabChange`, `tabs` (full `SUB_TABS` list), `pinnedTabs` (default: `['tasks', 'queue', 'chat']`)
   - Renders fixed bottom bar with pinned tabs + `...` button
   - `...` opens an existing `BottomSheet` (or modal) listing all tabs not already pinned
   - Each tab item shows icon + label + badge count (reuse badge logic from `RepoDetail.tsx`)
   - Selecting a tab from the sheet closes the sheet and navigates

3. **Integrate `MobileTabBar` into `RepoDetail.tsx`**:
   - Gate on `isMobile` (from `useBreakpoint()`)
   - When mobile: hide the top tab strip (`hidden` or conditional render), render `MobileTabBar` at the bottom
   - Pass `activeTab` (current sub-tab) and `onTabChange` handler that dispatches `SET_REPO_SUB_TAB`

4. **Update/remove `BottomNav.tsx`**:
   - The `Back` button can be relocated to the top header area on mobile (small `<` icon button beside the repo name)
   - Remove `Queue` and `Chat` from `BottomNav` since they now live in `MobileTabBar`
   - Keep `BottomNav` for non-repo pages if needed, or remove entirely if no longer used

5. **Styling & safe area**:
   - Bottom tab bar must respect iOS/Android safe area insets: `padding-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom)`
   - Height: `~56–64px` (standard mobile tab bar)
   - Content area must add matching bottom padding so content isn't hidden behind the tab bar
   - Active tab: filled icon + label colored with brand blue; inactive: outline icon + gray label
   - `...` button: uses the existing `EllipsisHorizontalIcon` or similar

6. **More sheet content**:
   - List rows for: Info, Git, Pipelines, Schedules (all tabs not in the pinned set)
   - Each row: icon + label + optional badge
   - Tapping a row navigates to that tab and closes the sheet

7. **Tests** — Add/update Vitest tests for `MobileTabBar` component (render, tab switching, more sheet open/close, badge display).

---

## Behavior Details

| Scenario | Behavior |
|----------|----------|
| Default mobile view | Bottom bar shows Tasks · Queue · Chat · `...` |
| Active tab = Tasks | Tasks icon filled + label blue, others gray |
| Tap `...` | BottomSheet opens with: Info, Git, Pipelines, Schedules |
| Select "Git" from sheet | Sheet closes, Git tab activates, bar shows Tasks · Queue · Chat · `...` (Git is NOT pinned) |
| Badge on Tasks | Badge count renders on Tasks tab icon (same as current top strip) |
| Badge on Queue | Running/queued counts render on Queue tab icon |
| Back navigation | `<` chevron in top header; not in bottom tab bar |
| Desktop | No change — top tab strip unchanged |

---

## Out of Scope

- Allowing users to customize which tabs are pinned (future enhancement)
- Reordering pinned tabs via drag (future enhancement)
- Changing desktop layout in any way
